title: Executive Order Creates Unauthorized Private-Citizen Obligations

violations.summary: President issues an executive order imposing new regulatory obligations on private businesses without any statutory authorization, in violation of Article III Section 6.2(a).

satisfied_duties.duty: pass a resolution of disapproval within 60 days to formally void the overreaching executive order
satisfied_duties.outcome: passed a resolution of disapproval; the executive order is void and may not be reissued in substantially the same form without statutory authorization

ai_summary.primary_violation: President issues an executive order imposing new regulatory obligations on private businesses without any statutory authorization, in violation of Article III Section 6.2(a).
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
